title: Paytm is Hiring: Full Stack Developer (Junior)

jsonLd.title: Paytm is Hiring: Full Stack Developer (Junior)
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Full Stack Developer looking for your next big career move? Paytm in Ludhiana offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Paytm:
Paytm is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Integrate third-party APIs and services
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in REST APIs
• Proficiency in Docker
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in TensorFlow
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Referral bonus program
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Ludhiana, Punjab, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Paytm!
